allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.0.8:5001/api/v1/auth/login" -Method POST -Body '{"email":"admin@fft.local","password":"ChangeMe123!"}' -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 6 -UseBasicParsing; "OK over LAN. StatusCode=$\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "STILL FAILING: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 5001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($p\) { Write-Output "Stopping PID $p"; Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } else { Write-Output "No process on 5001" })

PowerShell($ok=$false; foreach\($i in 1..15\){ try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.0.8:5001/api/v1/auth/login" -Method POST -Body '{"email":"admin@fft.local","password":"ChangeMe123!"}' -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 4 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "OK over LAN 192.168.0.8:5001 -> StatusCode=$\($r.StatusCode\)"; $ok=$true; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } }; if\(-not $ok\){ Write-Output "Still not reachable after waiting" })
PowerShell(Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.IPAddress -ne '127.0.0.1' } | Select-Object IPAddress, InterfaceAlias | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($ports = @\(8081,5001\); foreach \($p in $ports\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "Port $p : LISTENING" } else { "Port $p : not listening" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.29.14:8081/status" -TimeoutSec 8 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "REACHABLE on WiFi IP - HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\): $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Output "FAILED on WiFi IP: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.29.14:8081/status" -TimeoutSec 8 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Server UP on 192.168.29.14:8081 \(HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)\)" } catch { Write-Output "NOT reachable: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

Bash(curl -s -m 8 -o NUL -w "login_status=%{http_code} time=%{time_total}s\\n" -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/v1/auth/login -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"email\\":\\"x@x.com\\",\\"password\\":\\"y\\"}")
